summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Schwab Fundamental International Equity ETF (FNDF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of large firms from developed markets ex-US. The fund selects and weights using fundamental factors. FNDF was launched on Aug 15, 2013 and is issued by Charles Schwab.

holdings.infoBox: FNDF is an equity ETF with a total of 905 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 3.62%, Shell at 2.42%, TotalEnergies SE at 1.63%, HSBC Holdings at 1.14%, and BP p.l.c. at 1.09%.
